name: Desktop Apprentice
description: Teacher-student desktop assistant with teaching, assist, and student modes for macOS automation.

pollIntervalMs.description: How often to sample frontmost app on macOS.

maxEvents.description: Max number of observation events kept in the local knowledge base.

minConfidence.description: Minimum transition confidence required for assist/student predictions.

proposalCooldownMs.description: Dedup window for assist proposals with the same transition.

studentMaxSteps.description: Max steps executed per /apprentice run call in student mode.

knowledgeFile.description: Optional custom path for the knowledge base JSON file.
